traps: PCT carries two parallel field sets — regional* (regionalNatGatewayCount, regionalNatGatewayAzCount, regionalNatGatewayDataProcessed) and the legacy non-regional (numberOfGateways, dataProcessedPerNATGateway). Both work, but minimalConfig uses the regional set — the path the current UI defaults to.
Manifest defaults are 5 gateways × 3 AZs — wildly over-sized for a 'hello world'. minimalConfig overrides to 1×1; agents reading manifest defaults directly will over-estimate ~5×.
